articles.title: Relief Society Assembly Hall and Board Meeting Room Frontispiece
articles.notes: The provided PDF images show pages from January 1922 (Vol IX, No. 1) featuring 'Presiding Patriarchs of the Church' with portraits of various Smith family patriarchs. No content related to 'Relief Society Assembly Hall and Board Meeting Room Frontispiece' from June 1922 is visible in these images. The frontispiece would likely be an image/photograph with minimal or no text content.
